guardrails: This artifact refreshes the remaining implementation plan after W1.5.202 Skill candidate discovery plus secret-safe MCP configuration evidence.
No FR item is marked accepted and EXIT-P1-1 remains not_ready.
W1.5.202 mirrors the current evidence map buckets after FR-014 moved to runtime_bridge_needs_a4_review.
FR-007, FR-008, FR-011, FR-012, FR-013, FR-014, and FR-017 remain outside this implementation plan because they are pending A4 review inputs.
W1.5.202 does not modify accepted spec, ADR, schema, generated schema, dependency, packaging, updater, or baseline docx content.

Runtime-flow and bridge follow-up evidence must remain sanitized and must not include raw prompts, raw model output, uploaded-file bytes, query/hash secrets, response bodies, persisted params, raw MCP command_or_url or secret_ref values, secure paths, cache paths, or output directory values.
secure/** and cache/** remain untracked and must not be added to Git.

repair_track.objective: Re-plan only the remaining runtime-backed desktop behavior needed before FR-015 and FR-018 can move to A4 acceptance review; FR-014 is now packaged as runtime bridge evidence for A4 review.
entry_criteria: Use W1.5.202 FR evidence map as the current source of truth for remaining implementation gaps.
Keep A4-ready bridge items out of this implementation plan.
Preserve metadata-only evidence boundaries for snapshot and HITL paths.
planned_repair_steps: Implement automatic snapshot creation, restore-to-snapshot, and continue execution for FR-015.
Add pending-decision discovery plus pause/resume UX evidence for semi-auto HITL in FR-018.
planned_verification: Targeted visual smoke or reviewer capture only after implementation evidence exists
implementation_notes: FR-008 is no longer a remaining implementation item after W1.5.195-W1.5.196; it stays unaccepted and moves to A4 pending review inputs.
FR-011 is no longer a remaining implementation item after W1.5.201 combined project creation plus initial reference import evidence; it stays unaccepted and moves to A4 pending review inputs.

FR-017 is no longer a remaining implementation item after W1.5.199 selected-node Task Drawer artifact detail and node-bound action dispatch evidence; it stays unaccepted and moves to A4 pending review inputs.
FR-014 is no longer a remaining implementation item after W1.5.202 Skill candidate discovery plus secret-safe MCP configuration evidence; it stays unaccepted and moves to A4 pending review inputs.
All remaining items still require follow-up implementation or A4 evidence before any FR acceptance claim.
